steps.name: Structural Validation
warnings: CANNOT_MUTATE missing 'data_retention_policy' -- data governance is not constitutionally enforced. Add to CANNOT_MUTATE to prevent runtime modification.
CANNOT_MUTATE missing 'training_prohibition' -- data governance is not constitutionally enforced. Add to CANNOT_MUTATE to prevent runtime modification.
SensitiveDataGate not referenced in WHEN block -- sensitive data detection will not activate automatically.

steps.name: Audit Trail
steps.note: PARTIAL is acceptable — new agents have no mutations yet

system_description.purpose: Ensure regulatory compliance in financial services

risk_classification.annex_iii_item: Not classified as Annex III high-risk by default
risk_classification.annex_iii_label: General-purpose AI deployment — deployer must classify
risk_classification.deployer_note: Deployer must confirm this classification is accurate for their specific deployment context. Annex III categories depend on use, not only on the system itself.

fundamental_rights_assessment.basis: Advisory output only — no autonomous enforcement
mitigations: Security block is constitutionally protected (CANNOT_MUTATE)
Injection detection active in SECURITY rules
HighRiskInput WHEN activation routes to Sandbox review
HUMAN_REVIEW gate: 9 trigger conditions
fundamental_rights_assessment.residual_risk: PLACEHOLDER — deployer must assess and sign off
